author: Kaleidoscope Studio
description: AGE workflow event-router. Routes issue lifecycle events: plan-gate enforcement, auto-applies review+approval executionPolicy on new issues, workMode:planning enforcement for parent issues, agent assignment by role. On done: gate-check, process-adapter, and self-verification gates; unblocks dependents. Background sweeps: stale agent watchdog, cold-queue recovery defense, stranded reviewer verdicts, stale execution locks, cross-company assignment correction.

apiKey.description: Paperclip board API key for authenticated API calls
